arts.ttl: Maresca insists Chelsea have made progress
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has insisted that Chelsea have made significant progress under him despite unrest among fans. The Blues are sixth in the Premier League table with six games remaining – and very much involved in the battle for a Champions League place. arts.ttl: Chelsea's Moises Caicedo transfer stance revealed amid interest from Saudi Arabia
arts.sum: Chelsea have no intention of allowing Moises Caicedo to leave in the summer transfer window, football.london understands, following reported interest from Saudi Arabia. The 23-year-old midfielder has been one of the best in his position in the Premier League this season and the Blues fully appreciate just how exceptional he is.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca insists Chelsea's improvement is "going fast", defends playing style
arts.sum: Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca insists that his squad have been on a fast upward trajectory this season, despite currently sitting in sixth place in the Premier League table.
